affiliateDiagnostics: MY: Affiliate providers unavailable for MY
GLOBAL: Affiliate providers unavailable for US

GLOBAL/cj: CJ Product Search is not authorised for this token/company. The token works for CJ GraphQL, but the configured CJ company/user needs Product Search permission and joined advertiser/product-feed access before exact affiliate product links can be returned.

MY/cj: CJ Product Search is not authorised for this token/company. The token works for CJ GraphQL, but the configured CJ company/user needs Product Search permission and joined advertiser/product-feed access before exact affiliate product links can be returned.
usageNote: This library stores affiliate links, remote product image URLs, and optional local image cache paths. Download and commit product photos only when the affiliate programme/feed terms allow local hosting.
